title: Gear Fourth Awakens
description: Luffy reveals Gear Fourth and overwhelms Doflamingo with a new form built to break the tyrant.
scene: On pages 4–8, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, Trebol, Dressrosa Citizens move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Trebol unexpectedly goes up in flames!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huge flames are rising up from the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I hope he's okay! Isn't there anything we can do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No... it's best if we don't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes. To be honest, I think we'd probably just be a hindrance ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Even one who holds the same title of "Ouka Shichibukai," as Doflamingo does...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Luffy! Bring traffic- Run down here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thanks! This'll be a big help! Traffy's already done...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Don't presume you can step in on our battle! That fool still draws breath!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: He isn't out of the ring yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You mean to tell me you still haven't finished this thing up yet, Straw Hat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And get down from up here!

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth awakens, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
